package.name: rove_slam_ros
package.description: ROS 2 wrapper for the `rove_slam` lidar-inertial SLAM core (https://github.com/clubcapra/rove_slam, vendored as a git submodule under external/rove_slam). Provides a single ROS 2 node that subscribes to a Livox PointCloud2 + IMU and publishes TF, /odom, and a Z-banded obstacles cloud suitable for nav2. Launch files start either SLAM alone or SLAM + nav2 costmap stack headless.
